Star Wars Ep. VII: The Force Awakens (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $936,662,225Details
International Box Office $1,119,384,610
Worldwide Box Office $2,056,046,835
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $39,619,424
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $151,559,711
Total $191,179,135
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Rey, a scavenger from the planet Jakku, and renegade stormtrooper FN-2187 (nickname “Finn”) embark with resistance pilot Poe Dameron on a quest to destroy Starkiller Base and search for Luke Skywalker, the last remaining Jedi.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$247,966,675 (26.5% of total gross)
Legs:3.78 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:45.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$533,200,000 (worldwide box office is 3.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,134 opening theaters/4,134 max. theaters, 9.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $1,318,609,770

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 18th, 2015 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
December 18th, 2015 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: December 16th, 2015 (Wide) (France)
December 16th, 2015 (Wide) (Egypt)
December 16th, 2015 (Wide) (South Africa)
December 16th, 2015 (Wide) (Turkey)
December 16th, 2015 (Wide) (Thailand)
Video Release: April 1st, 2016 by Disney/Lucasfilm
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sci-fi action violence.
(Rating bulletin 2401 (Cert #50155), 11/25/2015)
Running Time: 136 minutes
Franchise: Star Wars

Synopsis

Rey, a scavenger from the planet Jakku, and renegade stormtrooper FN-2187 (nickname “Finn”) embark with resistance pilot Poe Dameron on a quest to destroy Starkiller Base and search for Luke Skywalker, the last remaining Jedi.

Theater counts:4,134 opening theaters/4,134 max. theaters, 9.2 weeks average run per theater
